description: Add multi-perspective agent exploration where multiple agents tackle the same problem from different angles in isolated worktrees, then present a comparison for user selection.

userStories.title: ExploreStrategy dataclass and strategy definitions
userStories.description: Define the data model for exploration strategies. Each strategy has a name, description, and prompt template that guides the AI toward a specific approach.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/parallel/explore.py with ExploreStrategy dataclass: name, description, prompt_template, constraints (optional list of strings)
Define 3 default strategies: 'minimal' (fewest changes, lowest risk), 'clean' (best architecture, may refactor), 'pragmatic' (balance of speed and quality)
Each strategy's prompt_template includes placeholders: {problem}, {codebase_context}, {constraints}
get_default_strategies() -> List[ExploreStrategy] returns the 3 defaults
Unit tests in tests/test_explore_strategy.py
userStories.notes: Foundation dataclass. Keep strategies simple — the AI does the heavy lifting.

userStories.title: ExploreExecutor: parallel agent spawning with strategies
userStories.description: Create ExploreExecutor that spawns one agent per strategy in isolated Git worktrees, each receiving a strategy-specific prompt for the same problem.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ExploreExecutor class in src/up/parallel/explore.py
execute(problem: str, strategies: List[ExploreStrategy], workspace: Path) -> List[ExploreResult]
Each agent gets its own worktree via existing worktree.py create_worktree()
Each agent receives: strategy prompt + problem description + relevant file context
ExploreResult dataclass: strategy_name, branch, worktree_path, success (bool), output (str), files_changed (list), error (optional)
Agents run in parallel using existing parallel/executor.py patterns
Timeout per agent configurable via .up/config.json: explore.agent_timeout (default 300s)
Unit tests with mocked AIEngine in tests/test_explore_executor.py
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. Reuses existing worktree and parallel execution infrastructure.

userStories.title: ExploreAnalyzer: compare agent results
userStories.description: Create ExploreAnalyzer that compares results from multiple agents: files changed, test results, diff size, and generates a structured comparison.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/parallel/analyze.py with ExploreAnalyzer class
analyze(results: List[ExploreResult], workspace: Path) -> ExploreComparison
ExploreComparison dataclass: strategies (list of ExploreResultSummary), recommendation (optional str)
ExploreResultSummary: strategy_name, files_changed_count, lines_added, lines_removed, tests_passed (bool), lint_passed (bool)
Runs verification (test/lint) in each worktree to get pass/fail status
Calculates diff stats via git diff --stat in each worktree
Unit tests in tests/test_explore_analyzer.py
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. Uses existing verification.py for test/lint checks.

userStories.title: Rich comparison display for explore results
userStories.description: Create a Rich terminal UI that displays the comparison of agent results side-by-side with key metrics, allowing the user to select an approach.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/ui/explore_display.py with display_comparison() function
Shows Rich table with columns: Strategy | Files Changed | Lines +/- | Tests | Lint | Approach Summary
Color coding: green for passing, red for failing, yellow for warnings
Shows truncated diff preview for each strategy (first 20 lines)
Prompts user: 'Which approach? [1/2/3/combine/none]'
Returns user selection as ExploreChoice enum: STRATEGY_1, STRATEGY_2, STRATEGY_3, COMBINE, NONE
userStories.notes: Depends on US-003. Uses Rich library (already a dependency).

userStories.title: Merge selected exploration result
userStories.description: After user selects an approach, merge the chosen worktree's changes back to the main branch. Clean up all worktrees.
acceptanceCriteria: Add merge_exploration() to src/up/parallel/explore.py
For single strategy selection: merge worktree using existing merge_worktree() from worktree.py
For 'combine': cherry-pick non-conflicting changes from multiple worktrees (best-effort)
For 'none': clean up all worktrees, no changes applied
All worktrees cleaned up after merge (success or failure)
Provenance recorded: which strategies were explored, which was selected, why
Integration test: spawn 2 mock agents, select one, verify merge
userStories.notes: Depends on US-004. Reuses existing worktree merge infrastructure.

userStories.title: CLI command: up agent explore
userStories.description: Add 'up agent explore' subcommand that orchestrates the full diverge-then-converge workflow: spawn agents, analyze results, display comparison, merge selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'explore' subcommand to src/up/commands/agent.py
'up agent explore "optimize database queries"' runs full workflow
Optional --strategies flag to specify custom strategy count (default 3)
Optional --timeout flag to override per-agent timeout
Shows progress spinner while agents work
Handles partial failures: if 1 of 3 agents fails, still shows comparison of successful ones
Records exploration in .up/state.json metrics
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002 through US-005. This is the user-facing command that ties everything together.

userStories.title: Custom strategy definitions via Markdown
userStories.description: Allow users to define custom exploration strategies as Markdown files in .up/plugins/*/strategies/ directories, extending the default 3.
acceptanceCriteria: Strategy .md format: YAML frontmatter (name, description, constraints) + body as prompt template
Add load_custom_strategies() to explore.py that scans plugin directories
Custom strategies merged with defaults (custom can override by name)
'up agent explore --strategies minimal,my-custom-strategy' selects specific strategies
Unit tests with sample custom strategy files
userStories.notes: Depends on US-006 and Phase 1 plugin system. Extends explore with plugin ecosystem.
